summary: Deployed end-to-end cybersecurity infrastructure for a federal government client including firewall configuration, SIEM implementation, and SOC setup. Achieved ISO 27001 compliance within 8 months.
Full SAP ERP implementation for a federal government ministry covering finance, HR, procurement, and asset management modules. Delivered on-time with 98% user adoption rate.
Construction and rehabilitation of 45 km national highway including drainage systems, signage, and road markings. Completed with ISO 27001 quality standards.
Structural engineering and construction of a 3-span bridge over a major river, including geotechnical surveys, pile foundations, and post-tensioned deck design.
Designed and deployed a real-time GPS fleet management and telematics system for 500+ government vehicles including dashboards, driver scoring, and maintenance alerts.
End-to-end HMIS implementation covering patient records, pharmacy, billing, lab integration, and bed management for a 600-bed public hospital.
Procurement, installation, and 5-year AMC of CT scanners, MRI machines, and digital X-ray units for a chain of district hospitals across Punjab.
Design, supply, and commissioning of 500 kW off-grid solar power systems across 20 remote villages, including battery storage and community training.
Design and deployment of 200 km fiber optic backbone network connecting 15 government facilities with redundant links, NOC setup, and 99.9% SLA commitment.
Built and deployed a scalable LMS for 50,000 students covering course delivery, assessments, certificates, and analytics dashboards for the Higher Education Commission.
Conducted comprehensive penetration testing and vulnerability assessment for 3 commercial banks, delivering remediation roadmaps and achieving PCI-DSS readiness.
Oracle ERP and MES integration for a large textile manufacturer, enabling real-time production tracking, quality control, and supply chain visibility.
Rehabilitation of 80 km rural road network in KPK including culverts, retaining walls, and storm water management to NHA specifications.
Structural design and supervision of a 120m pedestrian suspension bridge for a remote mountain community in Gilgit-Baltistan under an international donor program.
Implemented AI-powered route optimization and fleet telematics for a national FMCG distributor with 1,200 vehicles, reducing fuel cost by 18%.
Designed and launched a nationwide telemedicine platform connecting 200 rural health centres to specialist doctors in urban hospitals, with EHR integration and video consultation.
Emergency procurement and deployment of 300 ICU-grade ventilators and monitoring systems across 40 public hospitals during critical healthcare expansion.
Engineering, procurement, and construction of a 2 MW grid-tied solar power plant for a cement factory, reducing grid dependency by 35% and achieving 8-year ROI.
Deployed 800-node public Wi-Fi mesh network across a metropolitan city including traffic management integration and citizen portal with usage analytics.
Custom LMS built for a bank's 8,000-employee workforce covering compliance training, certification tracking, and skill-gap reporting with SCORM 2004 support.
Established 24/7 Security Operations Centre for a major telecom provider, including SIEM tuning, threat intelligence feeds, and Level 1-3 analyst workflows.
Implemented a citizen services ERP for a municipal corporation covering property tax, utility billing, birth/death registration, and complaint management with mobile app.
Two-lane expansion of a 30 km expressway section including asphaltic concrete overlay, barrier systems, and intelligent transport systems installation.
Construction of a 4-span steel girder flyover in a congested urban intersection, including traffic diversion planning, utility relocation, and aesthetic lighting.
Real-time fleet tracking and dispatch optimization system for 150 emergency ambulances across a provincial health department, reducing response time by 22%.
Deployed enterprise PACS (Picture Archiving and Communication System) for a 1,200-bed teaching hospital covering radiology workflow, teleradiology, and AI-assisted diagnosis.
Supply and integration of automated lab analyzers, LIS (Laboratory Information System), and sample tracking system for a network of 12 diagnostic laboratories.
Design and installation of 2,500 solar-powered LED street lights across 30 towns in Sindh with remote monitoring, self-cleaning panels, and 10-year warranty.
Complete network infrastructure overhaul for a 10,000-student university campus including core switching, wireless access, SD-WAN, and network security policies.
Developed a gamified LMS for 300,000 school students in Balochistan with offline-first capability, Urdu language support, and teacher performance dashboards.
Physical and logical security hardening of a Tier III data centre including access control systems, CCTV analytics, DLP implementation, and compliance audit.
Implementation of Microsoft Dynamics 365 for a large public university covering finance management, faculty payroll, student fee collection, and procurement workflows.
Construction of 18 km mountain road in AJK with retaining walls, slope stabilization, drainage channels, and snow clearing provisions for year-round accessibility.

project_title: Box Culvert and Minor Bridge Works
summary: Construction of 14 box culverts and 3 minor bridges across irrigation canals in Punjab agricultural zone to support year-round agricultural transport.
RFID-based student tracking, driver behavior monitoring, and route optimization system deployed for 350 school buses serving 15,000 students in a metropolitan area.
Deployed cloud-based EMR system across 80 clinics with appointment scheduling, prescription management, insurance claims integration, and patient mobile app.
Supply, installation, and commissioning of dental chairs, autoclaves, X-ray units, and compressors for 50 government dental clinics nationwide.
Design and installation of solar + battery hybrid backup systems for 25 rural hospitals, ensuring 24/7 power for critical medical equipment during grid outages.
Complete backbone redesign for a regional ISP serving 500,000 subscribers, including BGP optimization, peering arrangement, DDoS protection, and network redundancy.
Developed a specialized LMS for a medical college with 3D anatomy models, clinical case simulations, OSCE tracking, and integration with hospital rotations.
Implemented SWIFT Customer Security Programme (CSP) controls for a commercial bank, achieving full attestation and reducing audit findings from 23 to 0.
SAP S/4HANA implementation for an upstream oil exploration company covering plant maintenance, materials management, project systems, and HSE module.
Construction of a 12 km heavy-duty industrial access road with load-bearing pavement design, weight bridges, and truck turnaround facilities.
Construction of a 6-span pre-stressed concrete bridge over a major irrigation canal with balanced cantilever method, scour protection, and seismic isolation bearings.
Deployed heavy equipment telemetry and predictive maintenance system for 200 mining machines, reducing unplanned downtime by 31% and maintenance cost by 25%.
Implemented a centralized blood bank management system connecting 8 regional blood banks with donation tracking, compatibility testing, inventory forecasting, and mobile donor app.
5-year comprehensive maintenance contract for 1,200 biomedical devices across a hospital network including planned preventive maintenance, calibration, and 24-hour emergency repair.
Supply and installation of 1,000 solar-powered irrigation pumps for smallholder farmers in Sindh under a federal agricultural development initiative.
City-wide CCTV surveillance network with 2,000 IP cameras, edge analytics for ANPR and crowd detection, central command center integration, and 30-day storage.
Built a bilingual (Urdu/English) vocational training platform for NAVTTC covering 120 trade courses, apprenticeship tracking, competency-based assessments, and employer portal.

Designed and built a custom web-based tax filing portal for a federal government revenue authority using Python/Django and React, handling 1.2 million registered filers with peak loads of 40,000 concurrent sessions during filing deadlines. Delivered full SDLC including requirements workshops, UAT, and a 2-year support contract, reducing average filing time from 45 to 12 minutes.

Developed cross-platform iOS and Android citizen services application (Flutter) for a provincial government, integrating 14 departmental services including license renewal, bill payment, and complaint tracking. Achieved 800,000 downloads in the first year with a 4.4-star average rating and biometric login compliant with national digital identity standards.

Migrated a private bank's core workloads from on-premises data centers to a hybrid AWS/Azure cloud architecture: 220 virtual machines, 14 databases, and a containerized microservices middleware layer with zero data loss and under 4 hours of cumulative downtime. Implemented infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), cutting infrastructure costs by 34% annually.

Implemented an enterprise DevOps platform (GitLab CI, Kubernetes, ArgoCD) for an international telecom software vendor, standardizing build and release pipelines across 35 development teams. Reduced average release cycle from 6 weeks to 4 days and production rollback incidents by 71% through automated testing gates and blue-green deployments.

Built a national health data warehouse and business-intelligence layer (PostgreSQL, Apache Airflow, Power BI) for a federal health ministry, consolidating reporting from 600+ facilities into automated daily dashboards. Enabled disease-surveillance reporting that cut outbreak response time from 14 days to 48 hours.

Delivered an AI document-processing system for an international insurance group: OCR plus transformer-based extraction over 25 document types in English and Urdu, processing 90,000 documents per month at 96.2% field-level accuracy. Reduced manual data-entry headcount requirements by 60% and claim turnaround from 9 days to 36 hours.

Engineered a B2B e-commerce marketplace (microservices on Node.js/React, Stripe and local payment-gateway integration) for a private retail conglomerate, onboarding 2,400 wholesale vendors and processing PKR 1.8B in gross merchandise value in its first year. Included vendor portal, logistics integration, and real-time inventory sync across 3 warehouses.

Built the core payments backend for a licensed digital wallet operator: double-entry ledger, PCI-DSS-aligned card tokenization, 1LINK and Raast integration, and fraud-scoring rules engine sustaining 1,100 transactions per second in load testing. Platform now serves 2.5 million wallet accounts with 99.95% uptime since launch.

Developed and operate a multi-tenant HR and payroll SaaS product used by 180 corporate customers across the Gulf region, covering attendance, payroll runs with country-specific tax rules, and employee self-service. Single-instance architecture with tenant data isolation, SOC 2-aligned controls, and 99.9% measured availability over 24 months.

Provide 24/7 managed IT services and ITIL-based helpdesk for a federal government agency: 3,500 end users, 40 branch offices, SLA-backed incident response (P1 under 30 minutes), patch management, and endpoint security administration. Sustained 97.8% first-contact resolution within SLA across a 3-year contract with annual third-party audits.
